analysis.name: dogwifhat
analysis.summary: WIF 24小时涨幅14%，但流动性极低（仅1.2万美元），交易量极小，价格容易被操纵。基本面仍是纯Meme币，无实质价值支撑。近期催化来自Upbit上线等新闻，但已消化。当前价格较ATH跌96.7%，处于深度熊市。风险极高，不建议买入。
catalysts: 鲸鱼地址持续增持（CoinDesk报道）

latestNews.title: dogwifhat: WIF jumps 44%, breaks April’s $0.225 high on Upbit news - AMBCrypto

fundamentals: Solana链上Meme币，无团队、无VC、无实际用途
总供应量约9.99亿枚，全流通
当前市值约1.57亿美元（CoinGecko排名197）
marketRead: 24小时涨幅14%，但交易量仅669美元，流动性仅1.26万美元（VVS Finance DEX）
价格波动极易被大单操纵，实际市场深度极差
risks: 流动性极低，滑点巨大，无法大额交易
纯Meme币，无基本面支撑，价格归零风险高
已从ATH跌去96.7%，反弹空间有限
新闻催化已消化，缺乏新叙事
DEX交易对可能存在合约风险
sourceNotes: 数据来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，流动性数据仅反映VVS Finance DEX，可能不全面
新闻时间跨度大，部分为2024-2025年旧闻

profile.name: dogwifhat
profile.description: dogwifhat (WIF) is a Solana-based memecoin featuring a Shiba Inu dog wearing a pink knitted hat that has become a central figure in the 2024-2026 market. Originally launched anonymously in late 2023, the project operates on a decentralized, community-driven model with no formal venture capital backing or complex tokenomics. It represents a cultural phenomenon on the Solana blockchain that celebrates whimsy and simplicity over technical complexity, focusing on its identity as a playful mascot for the digital finance era. The project’s main value proposition is its "Pure Meme Identity," as it maintains a strict focus on its meme origins without forced utility or a pivot toward DeFi and gaming. The project embodies the community-driven nature of the Solana ecosystem, prioritizing "vibes" and meme-sharing as its primary growth drivers. It follows a "hat stays on" philosophy, maintaining a singular focus on its core meme rather than building a complex ecosystem. While the project does not have a formal governance structure or DAO, decisions are largely driven by social consensus among the community and key influencers. Notable community initiatives include the "Sphere Wif Hat" campaign,
